arts.ttl: Is Alisson Becker playing against Bournemouth? Liverpool team news
arts.sum: Goalkeeper Alisson Becker played in the San Siro win but missed practice on Thursday due to a muscular injury. The Brazilian goalkeeper played the full 90 minutes in the midweek win against AC Milan but reported a soreness on Thursday, forcing him to miss team practice.

arts.ttl: FPL Gameweek 5 Scout Picks: Liverpool double-up, no Haaland
arts.sum: Our pick of the best Fantasy Premier League players for Gameweek 5 The post FPL Gameweek 5 Scout Picks: Liverpool double-up, no Haaland appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Liverpool's Alexis Mac Allister issues true thoughts on Arne Slot with Jurgen Klopp claim
arts.sum: Arne Slot has recovered from his first bump in the road as Liverpool manager, beating AC Milan 3-1 after losing to Nottingham Forest, and midfielder Alexis Mac Allister sees a bright future

arts.ttl: ‘Brilliant’: Paul Merson says he really wouldn’t want to face £44m Liverpool player
arts.sum: Liverpool have some seriously scary players in their squad. Playing against the likes of Mohamed Salah and Virgil van Dijk must be a daunting task...

arts.ttl: Nantes owner shoots down 'BULLS***' reports Trent Alexander-Arnold was in talks to purchase the Ligue 1 club - as he insists he 'doesn't even know' the Liverpool star
arts.sum: The bizarre story has prompted a furious response from Kita, who insisted he had never even met Alexander-Arnold despite reports to the contrary.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Real to turn to Liverpool target as Rodri alternative?
arts.sum: Real Madrid are reportedly considering turning their attentions towards a move for Martin Zubimendi, should they fail in their pursuit of Manchester City's Rodri.

arts.ttl: Federico Chiesa set to repeat Mohamed Salah trick to unleash £41m Liverpool teammate
arts.sum: Liverpool playing five matches over the next fortnight means Federico Chiesa may soon make his full debut as Arne Slot rotates the squad with matches every midweek

arts.ttl: First Adidas Liverpool 25-26 Kit to Be Released 1 July 2025
arts.sum: Liverpool FC is set to end its kit partnership with Nike on June 30, 2025, with Adidas taking over starting July 1, 2025, according to reports and information from Footy Headlines.

arts.ttl: Bournemouth boss Andoni Iraola throws down gauntlet to in-form star Antoine Semenyo
arts.sum: Antoine Semenyo has been one of Bournemouth's standout players so far this season after bagging two goals and an assist in their first three fixtures but boss Andoni Iraola believes there is more to come

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou tipped to be sacked with former Liverpool boss favourite to take over at Spurs
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has started to struggle at Spurs in recent weeks
